item.title: @elonmusk: It's now transpired that the invader stabbed people in Edinburgh as he tried to get into a nursery!
item.description: It's now transpired that the invader stabbed people in Edinburgh as he tried to get into a nursery!

item.title: @elonmusk: Drones are easy to make, hard to stop, and bring Mutually Assured Destruction to conventional warfar...
item.description: Drones are easy to make, hard to stop, and bring Mutually Assured Destruction to conventional warfare.

item.title: @elonmusk: You can now extend your Grok Imagine videos. Update your app to try.
item.description: You can now extend your Grok Imagine videos. Update your app to try.

item.title: @elonmusk: In Canadian universities, whites are simply not allowed to claim they are indigenous to any land in ...
item.description: In Canadian universities, whites are simply not allowed to claim they are indigenous to any land in the world. It is not only the Quebecois—who founded French Canada through a very high birth rate, with only 1/7 of the inhabitants being immigrants when the province was conquered by the English in 1763—who are prohibited from being indigenous and must be identified as bad migrants who stole Canada. All European ethnic groups are denied indigeneity to any land. They are civic citizens only, no more native to their lands than foreign immigrants. This view is now officially consolidated in Wikipedia.en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Catego…The entry for “indigenous Europeans” identifies only minority/non-dominant groups with distinct pre-modern histories, marginalized languages, or traditional livelihoods. It excludes all majority populations of European nation-states. The indigenous groups listed include the Sámi in northern Scandinavia/Russia, Basques, Ingrian Finns, Votians, and Pelasgians. Only nonwhites can be indigenous to their lands, with their indigeneity increasing in intensity to the degree that they were colonized by whites. On the other hand, immigrants can claim to be indigenous to any Western land insofar as (i) they are making the case that they are as German as Germans or as Swedish as Swedes, and (ii) they are considered “marginalized and discriminated against,” which meets a key political criterion for indigeneity. Whites can be citizens only, and anyone in the world can be a citizen of their nations.

item.title: @elonmusk: Abigail Spanberger's office has released a statement saying they STILL will not honor an ICE detaine...
item.description: Abigail Spanberger's office has released a statement saying they STILL will not honor an ICE detainer against the illegal alien with 30 prior arrests who murdered 41-year-old Stephanie Minter in Fairfax last week. Instead, they demand that ICE receive a signed judicial warrant before they'll turn him over to the feds. The problem with that is ICE can only get a judicial warrant if an illegal alien is being investigated for or commits a federal crime. This means that Abigail Spanberger is literally giving illegal aliens permission to commit more violent crimes against Virginians before she will work with the feds to deport them.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX launched 12 rockets in February, the rest of the world launched 6.
item.description: SpaceX launched 12 rockets in February, the rest of the world launched 6.

item.title: @elonmusk: Almost impossible to overstate how much freer and how much more vigorous discourse was on the Intern...
item.description: Almost impossible to overstate how much freer and how much more vigorous discourse was on the Internet a decade ago.

item.title: @elonmusk: How many more children must die before action is taken? Enough is enough. Act now.
item.description: How many more children must die before action is taken? Enough is enough. Act now.

item.title: @elonmusk: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
item.description: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
